title: App Settings - General - About - Up to date
scenario: General > About section in App Settings displays correct "Up to date" status, version number, and release notes link matching Figma design
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or your profile avatar to access the side navigation.
expected: The About section displays: "Up to date" status, the correct version number (e.g., 1.2.3), and a tappable "Release Notes" link, all matching the Figma design specifications.
